hooks.command: files=$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- docs 2>/dev/null | grep '\.md$' | paste -sd ',' - | sed 's/,/, /g'); [ -z "$files" ] && exit 0; jq -n --arg f "$files" '{systemMessage: ("⚠️  Untracked planning doc(s) not committed (lost on workspace cleanup): " + $f + " — commit before ending the session.")}'
